summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of F0-A: Entity Identity & Context (Multi-Entity Foundation). All 42 backend tests passed successfully. Entity context, role-based entity distribution (Model 1), header-based entity switching, and backend isolation are fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns entity_context with all required keys (home_entity_id, allowed_entity_ids, active_entity_id, can_switch_entity, entities)
Backend: user object includes home_entity_id and allowed_entity_ids, NO password_hash (security check)
Backend: admin home=ent_ksc, allowed=[ent_ksc, ent_kanda], can_switch=True (cross-entity access)
Backend: manager allowed=[ent_ksc, ent_kanda], can_switch=True (cross-entity access)
Backend: sales home=ent_ksc, allowed=[ent_ksc] only, can_switch=False (locked to single entity)
Backend: sales3 home=ent_kanda, allowed=[ent_kanda] only (locked to ent_kanda)
Backend: warehouse allowed=[ent_ksc] only (locked to single entity)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me without header returns active_entity_id=home (ent_ksc for admin)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me with X-Entity-Id=ent_kanda switches admin to ent_kanda
Backend: ISOLATION - sales with X-Entity-Id=ent_kanda is IGNORED, stays at ent_ksc (cannot operate disallowed entity)
Backend: GET /api/auth/context returns 200 with entity context
Backend: GET /api/auth/context honors X-Entity-Id header
Backend: GET /api/entities returns 2 entities (ent_ksc, ent_kanda)
Backend: Entities have enriched fields: currency, coa_template, incentive_payer, numbering_scheme
Backend: ent_ksc incentive_payer=sales_entity (Model 1 silo selling)
Backend: entity_context.entities[ent_ksc].is_pkp=True (PKP/ppn)
Backend: entity_context.entities[ent_kanda].is_pkp=False (non-PKP/non_ppn)
Backend: REGRESSION - Valid login returns token with sess_ prefix
Backend: REGRESSION - Invalid password returns 401
Backend: REGRESSION - POST /api/auth/logout works (200)
Backend: REGRESSION - Protected endpoint /api/home/admin returns 200 for admin
Backend: REGRESSION - Protected endpoint /api/sales-orders returns 200 for admin

success_percentage.frontend: N/A (backend-only sub-phase, Entity Switcher UI is F0-B)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (auth endpoints + entity context service working correctly)
success_percentage.isolation: 100% (Model 1 silo selling enforced - sales cannot access disallowed entities)
